name: Muslin Swaddle Blanket - Cloud Island™ Fruits and Veggies
description:
From stroller rides to feeding time to holding them in your arms, help your baby stay cozy and comfy with this Muslin Swaddle Blanket from cloud island™. Made from 100% muslin cotton fabric, this printed baby swaddle blanket feels soft against their skin and helps them stay warm, making it great as a stroller cover, a burp cloth or a nursing blanket. Plus, it can also be used to swaddle your baby for extra warmth while holding them. Featuring allover print of colorful fruits and veggies on a white background, this muslin swaddle blanket brings fun flair to your little one's nursery decor while also keeping them comfortable.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
